scope.question: extraction_refresh: Only two active no-results registry records were added in this repair pass; broader fisetin and D+Q trial surveillance remains incomplete.

outputs.summary: Created the submitted registry-surveillance breadth repair candidate and updated the senolytics coverage assessment to name deferred fisetin frailty registries NCT03430037 and NCT03675724 while preserving the source-snapshot requirement. The extraction remains partial because ClinicalTrials.gov source snapshots could not be fetched, so no extraction-grade no-results registry records were added.

Clarifies that deferred fisetin frailty registries require source-snapshot-backed surveillance and that no extraction-grade no-results records were added because snapshot ingestion was blocked.
